search_document:
User Request: Customers by region.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Customers by Region
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of customers across different regions
Title: Customer Demographics
Type: table
Description: Summary of customer types and their counts by region
Title: Total Customers
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of customers

sql_queries.title: Customers by Region
sql_queries.description: Distribution of customers across different regions
sql_queries.sql: SELECT "Region", COUNT("CustomerID") AS "CustomerCount" FROM "Customers" GROUP BY "Region"

sql_queries.title: Customer Demographics
sql_queries.description: Summary of customer types and their counts by region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT cd."CustomerTypeID", cd."CustomerDesc", c."Region", COUNT(ccd."CustomerID") AS "CustomerCount" FROM "CustomerDemographics" cd JOIN "CustomerCustomerDemo" ccd ON cd."CustomerTypeID" = ccd."CustomerTypeID" JOIN "Customers" c ON ccd."CustomerID" = c."CustomerID" GROUP BY cd."CustomerTypeID", c."Region"
